metadata.name: Beta launch runway extension through 2026-07-15
metadata.notes: Generated by Codex on 2026-05-21 to fill audit coverage. Uses SoundHelix placeholder audio following existing launch runway pattern; replace with final approved Dr. Paul/Castos content before broad launch.

months.admin_notes: Launch runway month; extended scaffold through June 30.

months.description: July is about emotional responsibility: learning to choose your response without denying what you feel.

monthly_themes.title: Choosing Your Response
monthly_themes.excerpt: July is about the space between what happens and how you respond.
monthly_themes.body: Emotional responsibility is not emotional suppression. It is the practice of noticing what you feel, listening for the information inside it, and then choosing a response that reflects who you want to be. This month we work with the space between stimulus and response. Some days that space will feel wide and available. Other days it may be only one breath long. One breath is still a beginning. The work of July is to stop outsourcing your inner state to circumstances and start practicing the kind of response that makes your life feel more honest, steady, and free.
monthly_themes.reflection_prompt: Where in your life are you most ready to stop reacting automatically and start choosing your response?
monthly_themes.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace with final approved monthly theme before broad launch.

weekly_principles.title: The Discipline of Choosing
weekly_principles.excerpt: Intention becomes stronger when choices become specific.
weekly_principles.body: A value is easier to admire than to live. Living it requires choices: where your attention goes, what you stop feeding, what you protect, and what you are willing to disappoint in order to stay aligned. This week is about making intention concrete enough to guide your calendar, your conversations, and your next small step.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: What is one choice this week that would make your stated values more visible?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.

weekly_principles.title: Living Aligned When It Is Inconvenient
weekly_principles.excerpt: Alignment is most revealing when convenience is not available.
weekly_principles.body: It is easy to feel aligned when there is no cost. The deeper practice begins when there is pressure: the awkward conversation, the competing priority, the shortcut that would be easy but untrue. This week, notice the small moments where integrity asks for something from you.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: Where is alignment asking you to accept a small inconvenience this week?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.

weekly_principles.title: Protecting the Quiet Yes
weekly_principles.excerpt: The most important yeses are often quiet and easy to crowd out.
weekly_principles.body: Not every meaningful commitment announces itself dramatically. Some of the most important yeses are quiet: your health, your relationships, your inner steadiness, your daily practice. This week is about protecting the quiet yes before urgent noise claims the whole room.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: What quiet yes needs more protection in your life right now?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.

weekly_principles.title: Reviewing the Life You Are Practicing
weekly_principles.excerpt: A month of intention deserves an honest review.
weekly_principles.body: Review is not judgment. It is attention with a memory. As June closes, look at the life you practiced this month. What became clearer? What still feels misaligned? What small decision would carry the learning forward without turning it into pressure?
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: What did this month reveal about how you actually want to live?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.

weekly_principles.title: The Space Between Feeling and Response
weekly_principles.excerpt: That small space is where emotional responsibility begins.
weekly_principles.body: You may not choose the first feeling that arrives, but you can practice choosing what happens next. This week is about finding the space between feeling and response. Not to suppress emotion, but to let it inform you without taking over the whole conversation.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: Where do you most want more space between what you feel and what you do?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.

weekly_principles.title: Choosing the Story That Helps
weekly_principles.excerpt: The story you choose changes the options you can see.
weekly_principles.body: A story can make you smaller or steadier. It can turn another person into an enemy, a mistake into a verdict, or discomfort into proof that something is wrong. This week, practice choosing interpretations that are honest, useful, and generous enough to keep you free.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: What recurring story in your mind could use a more helpful interpretation?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold generated 2026-05-21; replace placeholder audio with final Castos episode.
